records.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Chevalier, technically, you're captain since you've made your pledges. What say you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Chevalier, technically, you're captain since you've made your pledges. What say you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Chevalier, technically, you're captain since you've made your pledges. What say you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even though they weren't chosen by the stars, they've been helping the Knights achieve justice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even though they weren't chosen by the stars, they've been helping the Knights achieve justice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even though they weren't chosen by the stars, they've been helping the Knights achieve justice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to be with them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to be with them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to be with them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Brave knights, I understand you spoke up to follow your faith.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Brave knights, I understand you spoke up to follow your faith.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Brave knights, I understand you spoke up to follow your faith.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's our long tradition that whoever draws the Virgo Sword inherits the title of the captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's our long tradition that whoever draws the Virgo Sword inherits the title of the captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's our long tradition that whoever draws the Virgo Sword inherits the title of the captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I stand here to fulfill the pledges that the former captain couldn't.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I stand here to fulfill the pledges that the former captain couldn't.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I stand here to fulfill the pledges that the former captain couldn't.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Knights took you orphans under its wing, and now you act as if the Virgo Sword is your personal possession.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Knights took you orphans under its wing, and now you act as if the Virgo Sword is your personal possession.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Knights took you orphans under its wing, and now you act as if the Virgo Sword is your personal possession.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We refuse to acknowledge you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We refuse to acknowledge you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We refuse to acknowledge you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I get where you're coming from.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I get where you're coming from.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I get where you're coming from.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But a knight's justice can only be achieved through their swords.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But a knight's justice can only be achieved through their swords.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But a knight's justice can only be achieved through their swords.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will you accept me if I win a battle without the Blessing of the Stars?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will you accept me if I win a battle without the Blessing of the Stars?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will you accept me if I win a battle without the Blessing of the Stars?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Without the Blessing of the Stars? Wait, does she want to fight us without using her CRF?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Without the Blessing of the Stars? Wait, does she want to fight us without using her CRF?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Without the Blessing of the Stars? Wait, does she want to fight us without using her CRF?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deal! If you lose, we want you to give up your position and return the Virgo Sword to the Knights.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deal! If you lose, we want you to give up your position and return the Virgo Sword to the Knights.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deal! If you lose, we want you to give up your position and return the Virgo Sword to the Knights.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deal. But I'm not going to go down so easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deal. But I'm not going to go down so easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deal. But I'm not going to go down so easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And then, BAM! POW! The Captain knocked the guys down!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And then, BAM! POW! The Captain knocked the guys down!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And then, BAM! POW! The Captain knocked the guys down!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The other knight bachelors got so agitated that they all came at her. She fought them all by herself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The other knight bachelors got so agitated that they all came at her. She fought them all by herself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The other knight bachelors got so agitated that they all came at her. She fought them all by herself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her hands started bleeding, but that didn't stop her from fighting them, even harder than before!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her hands started bleeding, but that didn't stop her from fighting them, even harder than before!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her hands started bleeding, but that didn't stop her from fighting them, even harder than before!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone who watched her fight knelt before her and declared their commitment to follow her pledges.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone who watched her fight knelt before her and declared their commitment to follow her pledges.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone who watched her fight knelt before her and declared their commitment to follow her pledges.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain! You're so amazing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain! You're so amazing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain! You're so amazing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It must have been so exciting to watch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It must have been so exciting to watch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It must have been so exciting to watch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wish I moved earlier. I would have been there to watch it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wish I moved earlier. I would have been there to watch it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wish I moved earlier. I would have been there to watch it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem. I might have gotten carried away with that fight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem. I might have gotten carried away with that fight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem. I might have gotten carried away with that fight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But looking back, I realized I couldn't have understood their passion if they didn't speak up that day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But looking back, I realized I couldn't have understood their passion if they didn't speak up that day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But looking back, I realized I couldn't have understood their passion if they didn't speak up that day.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone!

root.m_Talk_FRA: The Knights took you orphans under its wing, and now you act as if the Virgo Sword is your personal possession.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We refuse to acknowledge you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We refuse to acknowledge you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We refuse to acknowledge you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I get where you're coming from.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I get where you're coming from.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I get where you're coming from.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But a knight's justice can only be achieved through their swords.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But a knight's justice can only be achieved through their swords.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But a knight's justice can only be achieved through their swords.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Will you accept me if I win a battle without the Blessing of the Stars?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Will you accept me if I win a battle without the Blessing of the Stars?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Will you accept me if I win a battle without the Blessing of the Stars?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Without the Blessing of the Stars? Wait, does she want to fight us without using her CRF?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Without the Blessing of the Stars? Wait, does she want to fight us without using her CRF?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Without the Blessing of the Stars? Wait, does she want to fight us without using her CRF?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deal! If you lose, we want you to give up your position and return the Virgo Sword to the Knights.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deal! If you lose, we want you to give up your position and return the Virgo Sword to the Knights.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deal! If you lose, we want you to give up your position and return the Virgo Sword to the Knights.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deal. But I'm not going to go down so easily.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deal. But I'm not going to go down so easily.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deal. But I'm not going to go down so easily.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And then, BAM! POW! The Captain knocked the guys down!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And then, BAM! POW! The Captain knocked the guys down!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And then, BAM! POW! The Captain knocked the guys down!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The other knight bachelors got so agitated that they all came at her. She fought them all by herself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The other knight bachelors got so agitated that they all came at her. She fought them all by herself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The other knight bachelors got so agitated that they all came at her. She fought them all by herself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Her hands started bleeding, but that didn't stop her from fighting them, even harder than before!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Her hands started bleeding, but that didn't stop her from fighting them, even harder than before!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Her hands started bleeding, but that didn't stop her from fighting them, even harder than before!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone who watched her fight knelt before her and declared their commitment to follow her pledges.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone who watched her fight knelt before her and declared their commitment to follow her pledges.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone who watched her fight knelt before her and declared their commitment to follow her pledges.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain! You're so amazing!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain! You're so amazing!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain! You're so amazing!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It must have been so exciting to watch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It must have been so exciting to watch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It must have been so exciting to watch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wish I moved earlier. I would have been there to watch it...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wish I moved earlier. I would have been there to watch it...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wish I moved earlier. I would have been there to watch it...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem. I might have gotten carried away with that fight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem. I might have gotten carried away with that fight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem. I might have gotten carried away with that fight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But looking back, I realized I couldn't have understood their passion if they didn't speak up that day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But looking back, I realized I couldn't have understood their passion if they didn't speak up that day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But looking back, I realized I couldn't have understood their passion if they didn't speak up that day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, Deputy. Dame Liv was telling us some old stories.
root.m_Talk_VTN:

root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, Deputy. Dame Liv was telling us some old stories.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, Deputy. Dame Liv was telling us some old stories.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see. I left you, just for a moment, and you forgot all about your duties.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see. I left you, just for a moment, and you forgot all about your duties.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see. I left you, just for a moment, and you forgot all about your duties.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, you're the one who said our money from the families is official funds. We must earn our Blue Rose cruise tickets for the next year on our own.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, you're the one who said our money from the families is official funds. We must earn our Blue Rose cruise tickets for the next year on our own.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, you're the one who said our money from the families is official funds. We must earn our Blue Rose cruise tickets for the next year on our own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't believe you've been wasting time chitchatting. Did you forget we have an important duty, pool cleaning, to complete?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't believe you've been wasting time chitchatting. Did you forget we have an important duty, pool cleaning, to complete?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't believe you've been wasting time chitchatting. Did you forget we have an important duty, pool cleaning, to complete?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm ashamed...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm ashamed...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm ashamed...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, you came at the right time, Deputy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, you came at the right time, Deputy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, you came at the right time, Deputy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hansol, Arius. You probably don't know this, but on the Captain's inauguration day, the Deputy looked at her so intensely...

root.m_Talk_DEU: Hansol, Arius. You probably don't know this, but on the Captain's inauguration day, the Deputy looked at her so intensely...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hansol, Arius. You probably don't know this, but on the Captain's inauguration day, the Deputy looked at her so intensely...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gosh, just like she's looking at me right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gosh, just like she's looking at me right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gosh, just like she's looking at me right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you spread rumors about me, Dame Liv! Stop running and fight me like the knight you are!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you spread rumors about me, Dame Liv! Stop running and fight me like the knight you are!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you spread rumors about me, Dame Liv! Stop running and fight me like the knight you are!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Deputy and Dame Liv always train so hard.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Deputy and Dame Liv always train so hard.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Deputy and Dame Liv always train so hard.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Alright, let's get back to work. True knights do their best in everything they do.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Alright, let's get back to work. True knights do their best in everything they do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Alright, let's get back to work. True knights do their best in everything they do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, this is an extension of our training. Got it, Captain!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, this is an extension of our training. Got it, Captain!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, this is an extension of our training. Got it, Captain!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's work hard and go to Blue Rose together!
